methodology: Read-only grep/read audit via 5 parallel research passes over app.py (~21,290 lines), db-embedded schema, monster_taxonomy.py, community_leaderboard_rewards.py, and root-level .html templates. No runtime code executed against production; no DB mutation performed.

economy.currency_count_note: SP (player_sp table) exists as schema but earn/spend routes not confirmed in this pass - DATA_ONLY pending follow-up

avatar_hero.renderer: Layered static CSS z-index stacking onto a fixed 1056x1408 mannequin (not Canvas/SVG/sprite-sheet); positioning lookup tables computed but unused (dead code)
avatar_hero.equipped_state_storage: player_appearance (one scalar column per slot, no multi-item stacking)

equipment.items_with_real_stat_effect: ~148 (24 appearance effect entries + 78 combat gear tiers + 15 dead EQUIPMENT_DEFS + 10 dead SKILL_DEFS + 21 consumables)
known_defects: aura_moon and aura_celestial declare rank unlocks that RANK_APPEARANCE_UNLOCKS never grants (unobtainable)
combat_pet field always hardcoded 'none', no catalog entries
frame/stone-as-item/board-as-item slots reserved in API but zero catalog items use them
rarity vocabulary inconsistent: common/uncommon/rare/epic/legendary vs badge bronze/silver/gold/legendary

monster_boss_zones.asset_existence: UNKNOWN - assets/monsters not present in working tree and assets/ directory is entirely untracked by git

quests_rewards_shop_community.boss_rewards: PARTIAL (progress/star tracking only, no confirmed coin/xp payout)
quests_rewards_shop_community.inventory_backpack: DATA_ONLY (real backend, but mounted UI is a static COMING SOON stub)
quests_rewards_shop_community.community_rewards: ACTIVE_RUNTIME read-side; grant pipeline manual-only (CLI tools), scheduler exists only on unmerged branches
quests_rewards_shop_community.soul_or_question_records: DOES_NOT_EXIST as user feature (admin-only internal helpers only)

tests_note: No dedicated Hero/Avatar/Equipment/Inventory/Adventure/Monster/Boss test files exist in tests/ at time of audit - these systems currently have no direct automated coverage in this repo.
